title: pilosella piloselloides subsp. praealta
intro: Pilosella piloselloides subsp. praealta, also known as rough Hawk's-beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its hairy stems and yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella piloselloides subsp. praealta include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it a useful remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
